objectives: Set up Android Studio for Android development
Create and run a basic Kotlin Android app
Use debug software to inspect and troubleshoot a running app
learning_path.title: Android Development Environment Setup and First Kotlin App

objectives: Practice core programming constructs in Kotlin
Write Kotlin code suitable for Android app modules
Use Android Studio tooling to run and validate Kotlin changes
learning_path.title: Kotlin Programming Foundations for Android

objectives: Build UI screens using Jetpack Compose
Apply Material Design components and styling
Preview and iterate on UI in Android Studio
learning_path.title: Jetpack Compose UI Basics with Material Design

objectives: Use Android Jetpack Lifecycle to manage UI-related behavior
Implement ViewModel to hold and manage UI state
Connect Jetpack Compose UI to ViewModel-driven state
learning_path.title: Android Jetpack Lifecycle and ViewModel Fundamentals

objectives: Use Coroutines to perform background work safely
Integrate Coroutines with ViewModel for UI state updates
Use debug software to observe asynchronous execution issues
learning_path.title: Coroutines for Asynchronous Work in Android

objectives: Consume Rest Apis (Json/Http) from an Android app
Handle request/response flows using Coroutines
Display remote data in Jetpack Compose UI
learning_path.title: REST APIs (JSON/HTTP) Integration in an Android App

objectives: Design local storage using Sqlite/Room Database
Persist and query app data for offline use
Connect stored data to UI state updates
learning_path.title: Local Persistence with Sqlite/Room Database

objectives: Implement in-app navigation using Android Jetpack navigation patterns
Wire navigation actions from Jetpack Compose UI
Manage screen state across navigation flows with ViewModel
learning_path.title: Navigation with Android Jetpack and Compose

objectives: Apply Dependency Injection (Hilt/Dagger) to structure app components
Inject dependencies into ViewModel and data layers
Improve testability and maintainability through consistent dependency wiring
learning_path.title: Dependency Injection with Hilt/Dagger in Android

objectives: Use debug software to diagnose UI, data, and concurrency issues
Apply tools for software configuration management to manage project changes
Perform structured troubleshooting in Android Studio
learning_path.title: Debugging and Configuration Management for Android Projects

objectives: Review key Android Sdk components used in modern apps
Consolidate architecture using Android Jetpack (Lifecycle/Viewmodel/Navigation/Room)
Refine UI implementation with Jetpack Compose and Material Design
learning_path.title: Android SDK Components and App Architecture Review

objectives: Relate digital systems fundamentals to device behavior and performance constraints
Connect digital systems concepts to debugging observations and app performance symptoms
Apply digital systems understanding to make informed implementation choices
learning_path.title: Digital Systems Concepts for Mobile Developers

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
